title: Validation of RNA Extraction Methods and Suitable Reference Genes for Gene Expression Studies in Developing Fetal Human Inner Ear Tissue
author: Dudas, Jozsef
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
For the dataset files collection it is recommended to use the excel-Metadata file, which helps to connect the original data with the original published paper. In this regard, the original data are possible to FIND, since freely ACCESSIBLE in the Zenodo Repository, the used file formats are Interoperabile by using the required software the newest software versions also manage metadata, and due to free access the files are reusable. The data are published at   Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International.  
  Here original research data are provided together with the published paper.
